text:
Frog (カエル型, Kaeru-gata—lit. "Frog-type") Hunter × Hunter - Episode 83 (2011) Nippon TV - HUNTER×HUNTER - Chimera Ant: characters page was a Chimera Ant resembling an anthropomorphic frog. He served as an officer in Leol's squad. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 195 

Appearance

Frog wore a simple dark-colored robe and small red rectangular glasses.

Personality

Frog was confident and had an air of authority, as well as that of being an elderly individual, given his choice of the personal pronoun "washi" (わし, 儂), which is often stereotypically used to represent old characters in fiction.

Background

Little is known about Frog's former life prior to being a Chimera Ant; not even he himself knew much, if anything, about it. However, he recalled having felt an extreme sense of overwhelming dread as he died, presumably at the hands of Chimera Ant Queen or her underlings. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 196 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

The Chimera Ant Queen summons the Squadron Leaders deep into her room within the Chimera Ant Nest. Frog is among those who is summoned as he reads a newspaper. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 188 At a later date, Frog, Baro, Rhino, and various other Chimera Ants confront Gon, Killua, and Kite in the NGL forest, where he gives the group three choices: 

Decide an order in which they can fight them.
Try and escape.
Give up and surrender to them. 

Presumably, if they chose option 1, they would choose a representative from their side to fight them individually with a small chance of survival. If they chose option 2, that would annoy them, and they would soon catch and torture them. Finally, if they chose option 3, which he doesn't recommend, it would make the previous choice far less annoying. So Kite and the group choose option 1. Gon and Killua both kill their respective opponents Baro and Rhino, agitating Frog and so he volunteers to fight against Kite. However, before he can make a move, Kite uses his Crazy Slots ability, summoning a giant scythe that, in an instant, slices off Frog's head, causing him to remember the feeling of death. 

Abilities & Powers

Frog, like all Chimera Ants, is stronger than normal humans, and being a Chimera Ant officer, he's presumably stronger than the soldiers below him. 

Frog Physiology: Thanks to his frog genes, Frog was able to jump several meters high. 

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

The character's name was never given in the manga, and the 2011 anime adaptation only identifies him by his type of species in the credits.
He is referred to as カエル男 (Kaeru Otoko, literally "Frog Man"). 
In the credits for the English dub: "Frog". 
On the website for the 2011 anime adaptation made by Madhouse, he is called カエル型 (Kaeru-gata, literally "Frog-type").
